description:
Test the error handling of the Flight Search feature by searching for the invalid flight number 'ZZ0000' and the valid flight number 'AA100' (American Airlines). Document the app's response and behavior for both searches in a report at /sdcard/Documents/flight_search_report.txt.

The report must follow this format:

FLIGHT SEARCH ERROR HANDLING REPORT
====================================
Date: [Current Date]

INVALID SEARCH:
Flight Number Entered: ZZ0000
App Response: [Describe the exact error message or behavior observed]
Error Handled Gracefully: [Yes/No]

VALID SEARCH:
Flight Number Entered: AA100
App Response: [Describe the flight details found - airline, route, etc.]
Flight Found Successfully: [Yes/No]

SUMMARY:
The app [does/does not] handle invalid flight numbers gracefully.
